2606.27354.title: Error-Conditioned Neural Solvers
2606.27354.paper_summary: Neural surrogate models offer fast approximate mappings from PDE parameters to solutions, but they typically treat solving as a purely statistical task: once trained, they struggle to correct their own constraint violations and extrapolate beyond the training distribution. Recent hybrid methods promote physical correctness by targeting the PDE residual via gradient descent or Gauss--Newton steps, but inherit the compute cost and instability of the underlying classical optimizers. We show, theoretically and empirically, that numerically minimizing the PDE residual can be an unreliable proxy for reconstruction accuracy in ill-conditioned systems, explaining why these methods often do not make accurate predictions despite achieving low residuals. We propose error-conditioned Neural Solvers (ENS), built on a different principle: rather than an optimization target, the PDE residual field is passed as a direct input to the network at each iteration, enabling it to read the spatial structure of its own errors and learn an update policy to iteratively correct its predictions. Across four PDE families, ENS attains the highest prediction accuracy in the large majority of settings, with gains reaching $10\times$ on turbulent Kolmogorov flow, while avoiding the expensive compute cost of hybrid methods. ENS's learned correction policy generalizes under distribution shift, including zero-shot parameter changes and cross-equation transfer, where its relative advantage is largest in the ill-conditioned regimes where residual minimization is least reliable. Project website: https://neuralsolver.github.io/.
2606.27354.paper_summary_zh: 神經替代模型提供了從偏微分方程（PDE）參數到解的快速近似映射，但它們通常將求解視為純粹的統計任務：一旦訓練完成，它們很難修正自己的約束違反並在訓練分佈之外進行外推。最近的混合方法通過針對PDE殘差進行梯度下降或高斯-牛頓步驟來促進物理正確性，但繼承了底層經典優化器的計算成本和不穩定性。我們理論和實證地表明，在不良條件系統中，數值最小化PDE殘差可能是重建準確性的 unreliable proxy，這解釋了為什麼這些方法儘管達到了低殘差，卻常常無法做出準確的預測。我們提出了基於錯誤條件的神經求解器（ENS），其建立在不同的原則上：PDE殘差場不是作為優化目標，而是在每次迭代中作為直接輸入傳遞給網絡，使其能夠讀取自身錯誤的空間結構並學習更新策略以迭代修正其預測。在四個PDE家族中，ENS在大多數設置中達到了最高的預測準確性，在湍流Kolmogorov流中增益達到$10\times$，同時避免了混合方法的高昂計算成本。ENS學習的修正策略在分佈轉移下具有良好的泛化能力，包括零樣本參數變更和跨方程轉移，其相對優勢在殘差最小化最不可靠的不良條件範圍內最大。項目網站：https://neuralsolver.github.io/.
2606.27354.author: Haina Jiang et.al.
2606.27354.authors: Haina Jiang, Liam Wang, Peng-Chen Chen, Min Seop Kwak, Seungryong Kim, Brian Bell, Jeong Joon Park
